steps.title: The ELISA plate is sealed with...
steps.instruction: The ELISA plate is sealed with a slit seal and pl

steps.title: User is prompted to place the...
steps.instruction: User is prompted to place the ELISA plate on the Heater Shaker Module, which is then secured when the latches close.

steps.title: The samples (50 μL per sample)...
steps.instruction: The samples (50 μL per sample) are transferred into the ELISA plate.

steps.title: Enzyme Conjugate (100 μL per well)...
steps.instruction: Enzyme Conjugate (100 μL per well) is added into the ELISA plate.

steps.title: The ELISA plate is agitated at...
steps.instruction: The ELISA plate is agitated at 500 rpm for 120 min.

steps.title: The supernatant in each well is discarded
steps.instruction: The supernatant in each well is discarded.

steps.title: The wash buffer (250 μL per...
steps.instruction: The wash buffer (250 μL per well) is added into the ELISA plate.

steps.title: The supernatant in each well is discarded
steps.instruction: The supernatant in each well is discarded.

steps.title: For 3 more washes, Step 6 and 7 are repeated
steps.instruction: For 3 more washes, Step 6 and 7 are repeated.

steps.title: Substrate Solution (100 μL per well)...
steps.instruction: Substrate Solution (100 μL per well) is added into the ELISA plate.

steps.title: The ELISA plate is agitated at...
steps.instruction: The ELISA plate is agitated at 500 rpm for 30 min to develop photometric signal.

steps.title: Stop Solution (100 μL per well)...
steps.instruction: Stop Solution (100 μL per well) is added into the EIA plate.

steps.title: The latches of the Heater Shaker...
steps.instruction: The latches of the Heater Shaker Module open, and user is prompted to move the ELISA plate to a microplate reader.
